description: NTILE() window function returns i64 non-nullable bucket number
name: window_ntile
query_sql:
-- @name NtileSales
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, amount, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY amount) AS quartile FROM sales
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE sales (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, employee_id INTEGER NOT NULL, department TEXT NOT NULL, amount INTEGER NOT NULL, sale_date DATE NOT NULL);
